_readme: Sub-Saharan Africa phenotype. Import into Ethnographer using Import Profile.
_instructions: To use: open Ethnographer, click 'Import Profile' and select this file. The preset will be added as a new group. All traits use default peak distributions — adjust to suit your worldbuilding needs.
name: Bantuid
description: Template: Bantuid. Edit the Description field after import. Source: https://humanphenotypes.net/basic/Bantuid.html
